name: australia-formation
description: > Use this skill whenever asked about forming, incorporating, or registering a company in Australia. Trigger on phrases like \"set up a company in Australia\", \"Pty Ltd\", \"ASIC registration\", \"Australian company formation\", \"register a business Australia\", \"ABN\", \"ACN\", \"proprietary limited\", \"sole trader Australia\", \"partnership Australia\", or any question about starting a business entity in Australia. Covers entity types (Pty Ltd, Ltd, sole trader, partnership, trust), regist
author: openaccountants
